intro.title: Welcome to the Planefence Configuration Wizard
paragraphs: This page helps you set the parameters for Planefence. It stores them in planefence.config.
You can use this Wizard, or alternatively edit planefence.config directly.
Use the top tabs to move between sections.
Press Save to write the parameters to planefence.config, or Cancel to discard changes.

tabs.title: Web UI
tabs.description: Main web page and map behavior.

PF_HTTP_PORT.label: PF_HTTP_PORT
PF_HTTP_PORT.description: Main Planefence web server port inside the container.

PF_CONFIG_HTTP_PORT.label: PF_CONFIG_HTTP_PORT
PF_CONFIG_HTTP_PORT.description: Dedicated configuration interface port inside the container.

PF_OPENAIP_LAYER.description: Show OpenAIP layer on heatmap when ON.

PF_OPENAIPKEY.description: Valid OpenAIP API key from https://www.openaip.net

PF_SHOWIMAGES.description: Include aircraft photos from planespotters.net in UI and notifications.

PREFER_PA_DB_FOR_PHOTOS.description: Image lookup preference. ON checks Plane-Alert DB first and falls back to planespotters.net. OFF or empty checks planespotters.net first and falls back to Plane-Alert DB.

PA_COLLECT_CANDIDATES.description: Enable automatic collection of potential Plane-Alert candidates from socket30003 data.

PA_COLLECT_CANDIDATES_FILTER_FILE.description: Optional filename in your config directory to use instead of pa-candidates-filter.txt. Leave empty to use pa-candidates-filter.txt.

PA_COLLECT_CANDIDATES_LOG.description: Optional filename in your config directory for logging which filter matched each collected candidate. Leave empty to disable logging.

PF_NOTIF_BEHAVIOR.description: Notification timing behavior: pre measures from first observation; post measures from last observation.

PF_SCREENSHOTURL.description: Base URL of the screenshot service. Service must support GET /snap/<flight> returning PNG.

PF_SCREENSHOT_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum wait time in seconds for screenshot generation.

DISCORD_MEDIA.description: Type of media to attach to Discord messages: empty = no media, screenshot = tar1090 screenshot, photo = aircraft photo, photo+screenshot = photo main and screenshot thumbnail, screenshot+photo = screenshot main and photo thumbnail.

PF_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Target Telegram chat for Planefence notifications. Use numeric ID for private chats or @channelname for public channels.

PA_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Target Telegram chat for Plane-Alert notifications. Use numeric ID for private chats or @channelname for public channels.

PF_TELEGRAM_CHAT_TYPE.description: Planefence Telegram delivery mode. Use dm for direct messages (no retained channel link), or normal for channel-style posts.

PA_TELEGRAM_CHAT_TYPE.description: Plane-Alert Telegram delivery mode. Use dm for direct messages (no retained channel link), or normal for channel-style posts.

PF_MQTT_URL.description: MQTT broker URL for Planefence. Supports mqtt:// or mqtts:// and optional user:pass, port, and topic in the URL.

PF_MQTT_TLS.description: Set to enable TLS for Planefence MQTT publishing; leave empty for plaintext.

PF_MQTT_CAFILE.description: Optional CA certificate file path for Planefence MQTT TLS (for self-signed brokers).

PF_MQTT_TLS_INSECURE.description: Set to true to disable certificate verification for Planefence MQTT TLS.

PF_MQTT_DATETIME_FORMAT.description: Optional Linux date format string for Planefence MQTT timestamps (default %s).

PF_MQTT_FIELDS.description: Optional comma/space-separated list of Planefence fields to publish; empty publishes all fields.

PA_MQTT_URL.description: MQTT broker URL for Plane-Alert. Supports mqtt:// or mqtts:// and optional user:pass, port, and topic in the URL.

PA_MQTT_TLS.description: Set to enable TLS for Plane-Alert MQTT publishing; leave empty for plaintext.

PA_MQTT_CAFILE.description: Optional CA certificate file path for Plane-Alert MQTT TLS (for self-signed brokers).

PA_MQTT_TLS_INSECURE.description: Set to true to disable certificate verification for Plane-Alert MQTT TLS.

PA_MQTT_DATETIME_FORMAT.description: Optional Linux date format string for Plane-Alert MQTT timestamps (default %s).

PA_MQTT_FIELDS.description: Optional comma/space-separated list of Plane-Alert fields to publish; empty publishes all fields.
